item.name: Warbear Horn
item.description: This imposing horn emits a thunderous tone that summons your fearless warbear.

mount.name: Warbear
mount.action: Summon forth your fearless warbear, veteran of a thousand battles, to fill your enemies with dread.
mount.description: In generations past, warriors seeking fame and glory would journey out into the untamed wilds of Abalathia's Spine in search of the giant grizzled bears that roamed the mountains, and would wrestle the beasts into submission, riding their prizes back to civilization. That is, or die trying.
mount.tooltip:
How do you like my
pets? Not too playful
for you, I hope?
- Beast Trainer
